ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_ontology" (
  "go_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene ontology term */,
  "term" TEXT /* The name of the gene ontology term */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the gene ontology term (e.g., biological process, molecular function, cellular component) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene ontology term */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace for the ontology term */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database of the ontology term */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ontology term was first added to the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the ontology term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* Reference to the gene ontology term */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the associated gene */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Code indicating the type of evidence supporting the association */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was made */,
  "curator" TEXT /* User who curated the association */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the association (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_associations_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES gene_ontology ("go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_associations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* The standard name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism the gene belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was first added to the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the gene record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene set */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* Reference to the gene ontology term */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the gene set associated with the term */,
  "x" REAL /* A calculated statistic used in the enrichment analysis */,
  "p_value" REAL /* The p-value indicating the significance of the enrichment */,
  "fold_enrichment" REAL /* Fold enrichment score */,
  "bonferroni" REAL /* Bonferroni correction value */,
  "benjamini" REAL /* Benjamini correction value */,
  "fdr" REAL /* False discovery rate (FDR) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the enrichment analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who performed the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the p-value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_analysis_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES gene_ontology ("go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_analysis_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_analysis_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_sets" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene set */,
  "gene_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene set */,
  "total_genes" INTEGER /* Total number of genes in the gene set */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene set was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the gene set */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the gene set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the gene set (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_sets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_sets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
